description: Maps Azure Retail Prices meter names to Sentinel/Log Analytics cost categories. Microsoft has renamed several meters over time; both the legacy and current names are listed so a workspace on either pricing surface receives a non-zero unit price. When the API returns more than one row for the same meter name (e.g. a 0-priced commitment-tier 'included' row alongside a non-zero PAYG row), the cost calculator takes the MAX unit price across the rows — that yields the PAYG rate, which is the right baseline for a non-committed workspace.

categories.description: Log Analytics per-GB ingestion. For a Sentinel-enabled workspace this is paid in addition to SentinelPremium.
Microsoft Sentinel per-GB premium charge layered on top of LA ingestion.
Basic Logs plan per-GB ingestion. Query-time billing for Basic plan is not modelled.
Auxiliary Logs plan per-GB ingestion. Query-time billing for Auxiliary plan is not modelled.
Per-GB-month interactive retention beyond the default free interactive period.
